note: cold sdd-impl-judge round 1: IMPLEMENTATION_PASS false — mutation testing caught a real coverage gap on the 'emitted as TOON by default and as JSON on request' scenario: the test exercised renderVerdictToon + JSON.stringify directly but never drove main()'s --format flag path, so a mutation hard-coding the CLI format to 'json' (ignoring the flag) left all tests green. The engine's flag logic was itself correct (judge confirmed); the gap was the check. Fix (test only, frozen .feature untouched): the format scenario now drives main() end-to-end over a temp-file ClassifyInput, capturing stdout, asserting TOON with no flag and JSON with --format json and that the two differ.
